Kodi Sirukki Vaasam Song Lyrics
Singer : Anand Aravindakshan & Shweta Mohan
Music : Santhosh Narayanan
Lyrics : Vivek

unna vachchen ulla
ada vellakatti pulla
ini ellaamey
un koodathaan

venaam.. uyir venaam
udal venaam
nizhal venaam
adi nee mattum thaan
venundi

unna vachchen ulla
ada vellakatti pulla
ini ellaamey
un koodathaan

venaam.. uyir venaam
udal venaam
nizhal venaam
adi nee mattum thaan
venundi

otti kuzhayira
ena sakka puzhiyura
oru pakkam nerayura
veral pattu kalayura

thotta neliyura
ena kuththi kodaiyura
kodi koththa sariyura
oru pithaa alayuren.

unna vachchen ulla
ada vellakatti pulla

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Sirukki Vaasam'?

The song conveys a playful and romantic vibe, celebrating love and the joy it brings.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Kodi'?

In Kodi, this song highlights the blossoming romance between the lead characters, adding a light-hearted touch to the narrative.

Who are the singers of 'Sirukki Vaasam'?

The song is beautifully sung by Anand Aravindakshan and Shweta Mohan.

Who composed the music for 'Sirukki Vaasam'?

The music for this song was composed by Santhosh Narayanan, known for his innovative sound.

When was 'Sirukki Vaasam' released?

The song was released on October 5, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sirukki Vaasam, the playful lyrics and upbeat melody create a delightful atmosphere that resonates with the joy of love. The song is a celebration of romance, showcasing the chemistry between the lead characters in Kodi. With its catchy tune and lively performances by Anand Aravindakshan and Shweta Mohan, it evokes feelings of happiness and excitement. This track is perfect for any celebration, making it a favorite among fans of Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sirukki Vaasam from the movie Kodi is a vibrant duet that perfectly captures the essence of youthful romance. With Anand Aravindakshan and Shweta Mohan's enchanting vocals, paired with Santhosh Narayanan's lively composition, this song is sure to uplift your spirits. Dive into the joyous vibes of this track that celebrates love and togetherness!
stanzaMeanings: I came with a spark in my eyes.
I placed a flower on it and made it beautiful.
The old and the new have merged together.
In every direction, the light has spread.
The bird that was once in the nest is now free.
The one who came to the front is now the leader.
With a small breeze, my heart is overwhelmed.
I have kept you close, everything now belongs to you.
I don't want anything... I don't want life, body, or shadow, only you.
I have offered a golden flower to the moon.
I won't even think of giving my life away.
This hunger that I can't see is like a hidden trap.
The garland of flowers is blooming beautifully.
With a small breeze, my heart is overwhelmed.
I have kept you close, everything now belongs to you.
I don't want anything... I don't want life, body, or shadow, only you.
The roots are deep, the flow is strong, and the connection is real.
The grains are plentiful, the harvest is good, and the shelter is secure.
The roots are deep, the flow is strong, and the connection is real.
The grains are plentiful, the harvest is good, and the shelter is secure.
The roots are deep, the flow is strong, and the connection is real.
With a small breeze, my heart is overwhelmed.
I have kept you close, everything now belongs to you.
I don't want anything... I don't want life, body, or shadow, only you.
